basic_details.job_title: NIT Manipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Manipur has invited applications for the position of Deputy Director from among the presently working Professors of the Institute. This is a prestigious administrative position. The last date for receipt of the hard copy of the application is 31 July 2026. Find complete details including eligibility criteria, terms & conditions, and application process below.

qualification.details: Applications are invited only from presently working Professors of NIT Manipur. The detailed eligibility criteria are as under: | Minimum 5 years of experience as Professor. The candidate should not be exceeding 60 years of age as on the last date of application (31.07.2026). Should have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean. Sufficient contribution in academics, administration, and outreach activities. Must be an eminent person in his/her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record throughout. | All eligibility shall be reckoned as on 31st July 2026.

how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed application form (available on the Institute website).
Attach self-attested copies of all relevant testimonials, certificates, and supporting documents.
Forward the application through the Head of the Department.
Send the complete application to: The Director, National Institute of Technology Manipur, Imphal.
The envelope must be super-scribed as: “APPLICATION FOR THE POSITION OF DEPUTY DIRECTOR”.
Last date of receipt of hard copy: 31 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.
important_instructions: Only applications forwarded through proper channel (HoD) will be considered. Incomplete applications or those received after the last date will not be entertained. Other terms and conditions will be as per NIT Act & Statutes. For further details, visit the official website www.nitmanipur.ac.in regularly.

The candidate should not be exceeding 60 years of age as on the last date of application (31.07.2026). Should have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean. All eligibility shall be reckoned as on 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Manipur Deputy Director 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of hard copy of the application is 31 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for the Deputy Director post at NIT Manipur?
faq.answer: Only presently working Professors of NIT Manipur are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for NIT Manipur Deputy Director?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum 5 years of experience as Professor.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Deputy Director position at NIT Manipur?
faq.answer: The candidate should not exceed 60 years of age as on 31.07.2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is prior experience as HoD or Dean mandatory for NIT Manipur Deputy Director?
faq.answer: Yes, the candidate must have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Manipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit the hard copy of the application through HoD to the Director, NIT Manipur by 31.07.2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is the Deputy Director post open for external candidates?
faq.answer: No, the position is open only for serving Professors of NIT Manipur.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for NIT Manipur Deputy Director application?
faq.answer: Duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of certificates, testimonials, and other supporting documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send the application for Deputy Director at NIT Manipur?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent to The Director, National Institute of Technology Manipur, Imphal.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form and official notification for NIT Manipur Deputy Director 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official website https://www.nitmanipur.ac.in/ for the detailed advertisement and application form.
